inlineContent.text: Be the hero to change that by watching the video or reading the transcript on WWDCIndex and providing notes! It’s super easy:

abstract.text: Turi Create is an open source toolset for creating Core ML models, for tasks such as image classification, object detection, style transfers, recommendations, and more. Learn how you can use Turi Create to build models for your apps.
Xcode 10, Swift 4.2, iOS 12, macOS 10.14 (Mojave), tvOS 12, watchOS 5.

Create ML is a new framework designed to help you easily build machine learning models using Swift and Xcode. Designed for Simplicity and Performance. Learn how you can build customized models from data that will enable new and powerful features in your apps using Create ML.

Introduced just one year ago, Core ML has already revolutionized the way apps can benefit from machine learning, by enabling fast and private on device machine learning features for your app. Find out how new Core ML features let you reduce the size of models, make them more flexible, and dramatically improve performance.

doc://WWDCNotes/documentation/WWDCNotes/.title: What’s New in Core ML, Part 1

abstract.text: Session notes shared by the community for the community.

doc://WWDCNotes/documentation/WWDCNotes/.title: What’s New in Core ML, Part 2

abstract.text: The Core ML tools ecosystem gives you many options for building and optimizing models to meet your app requirements. Learn how to add flexibility to existing models, quantize them, and take advantage of Core ML’s support for customization.

Apple’s open source toolset, Turi Create, recently added tasks for Core ML model creation including Drawing Classification and One-Shot Object Detection. Learn how to quickly use these capabilities in your apps as well as new techniques for visualizing and evaluating the performance of your custom models.

doc://WWDCNotes/documentation/WWDCNotes/.title: Drawing Classification and One-Shot Object Detection in Turi Create

abstract.text: Core Image is the essential framework for handling image processing tasks in your photo and video apps. In this session, we’ll explore new additions to the framework that allow you to achieve great performance in your filter chains and custom CIKernels. We’ll also demo a new approach to prototyping in Core Image through the use of an interactive Python environment. Through these techniques you’ll discover new ideas for building new creative effects as well as practical approaches to batch processing images for tasks such as image compositing and data boosting for machine learning.

doc://WWDCNotes/documentation/WWDCNotes/.title: Core Image: Performance, Prototyping, and Python

abstract.text: Using Core ML models in Vision makes the creation of powerful Computer Vision applications easy. Learn how easy it is to use custom trained classifiers and object recognition models in a live camera capture. In addition, you’ll learn about the latest additions to the Vision Framework along with a deeper dive into some its fundamentals.
